steps.title: Apply the one-intersection condition
steps.content:
For exactly one intersection point, the discriminant must equal $0$:
$$(-24)^2 - 4(2)(64-a) = 0$$
$$576 - 512 + 8a = 0$$
$$64 + 8a = 0 \Rightarrow a = -8$$

steps.title: Find x at the tangent point
steps.content: With $a = -8$: $2x^2 - 24x + 72 = 0$, or $x^2 - 12x + 36 = 0$, which factors as $(x-6)^2 = 0$. So $x = 6$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
